title: GraveGain2D
description: A dark fantasy action RPG featuring emoji-based visuals, 2.5D lighting, procedural dungeons, dialogue system, and a starship management hub.

maker.name: Antigravity Dev
maker.bio: Specializing in high-fidelity HTML5 game experiences with immersive systems and rich game-feel.

keyboard.Left-Click: Melee / Primary Skill (Hold for Charge Attack)

instructions: Choose your race and class, clear procedurally generated dungeon floors, collect Gold, and buy upgrades. Return to the LuckyStarShip hub to grow offline crops, exchange gold, and repair modules.
